response: Define the study objectives to ensure data collection aligns with data analysis goals. Collect data from various sources to generate data that supports the study's hypothesis. Monitor data trends to identify data patterns that may indicate disease spread. Analyze data using statistical methods to extract data insights relevant to the population. Ensure data quality by validating data entries to maintain data accuracy. Store data securely to protect data integrity throughout the study period. Interpret data findings to derive data conclusions that inform public health decisions. Share data results to promote data transparency and encourage further research.
